data.title: NY AG accuses Coinbase, Gemini of operating unlicensed markets, in crackdown on prediction markets, putting pressure on crypto firms amid increasing state regulation.
data.description: The Attorney General Letitia James accused both Coinbase and Gemini of operating unlicensed markets, intensifying the scrutiny on cryptocurrency firms. This development comes as states are increasingly working towards regulating platforms that facilitate event-based trading.

data.title: Bitcoin Hits $78,000 Wall, But Charles Schwab Analyst Says The Real Resistance Is Higher
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has reached a standstill at $78,000, with Charles Schwab (SCHW) highlighting two resistance levels that may cap the rally, despite a significant $1.4 billion influx in weekly ETF investments. The active investor's cost basis currently hovers around $78,000, marking the average purchase price of Bitcoin on secondary markets. According to Jim Ferraioli, Director of Digital Currencies Research and Strategy at the Schwab Center for Financial Research, this price level, along with $83,000, suggests that the average Bitcoin investor is currently facing losses. Ferraioli believes these levels could act as stronger resistance points compared to moving averages. Additionally, the $83,000 mark signifies the average cost basis for all spot Bitcoin exchange-traded products (ETPs), indicating a critical sell zone. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Voyage Launches the First AI-Native RPG Platform, Signaling the Future of Gaming
data.description: Latitude has introduced Voyage, the world's inaugural AI role-playing game (RPG) platform. In this innovative game, every aspect is player-driven; from the creation of worlds to the behavior of characters, and each decision holds genuine outcomes. Notably, Google's AI Futures Fund and key figures from Roblox, such as Latitude board member Craig Donato, have invested in Voyage. Other investors included NFX, Griffin Gaming Partners, Midjourney, and Album VC.

data.title: BTC inflows to Binance drop to lowest levels since 2023, as BTC traders eye $80K. Exchange activity varies with Coinbase leading.
data.description: Activity in the Bitcoin market is showing varying trends across exchanges, with Binance experiencing a decrease in selling pressure, while Coinbase remains more active. The inflows of Bitcoin are unevenly distributed, with Binance witnessing a decrease in selling activity. Conversely, Coinbase shows a more dominant position in the market, signaling higher levels of trading. This divergence in inflows highlights the contrasting market dynamics between the two exchanges. Overall, the latest data indicates a shift in Bitcoin trading patterns, with Binance experiencing decreased selling pressure compared to the more active Coinbase.

data.title: Notre Dame Academy Rebrand Reflects Unified Mission
data.description: A prestigious school in Los Angeles, Notre Dame Academy, has recently announced a new brand identity that highlights its dedication to readying students for the future. The refreshed look showcases the school's commitment to a unified vision and mission. The changes include incorporating a coeducational elementary program as part of the school's offerings. This move signifies a proactive step towards enhancing the educational experience for its students.

data.title: Input 1 Powers a Seamless Billing and Payment Experience Inside the Insuresoft Diamond System for VGM Insurance Services
data.description: Input 1, a company based in Westlake Village, California, revealed on April 21, 2026, that they have efficiently combined their embedded billing and digital payment infrastructure. The company specializes in offering technological solutions for billing, digital payments, and premium finance services to the insurance sector.

data.title: Zenwise Introduces Metabolism + Gut to Support Digestion, Satiety, and Metabolic Balance
data.description: Today in San Diego, Zenwise revealed the debut of Metabolism + Gut, a new daily supplement blend containing prebiotic fiber and probiotics. This formula aims to enhance feelings of fullness, aid in digestive regularity, and strengthen the gut barrier by prioritizing gut health in metabolism.

data.title: MikeWorldWide Hires Mike Sacks as Managing Director to Continue Rapid Growth of Corporate Reputation and Advisory Capabilities
data.description: In response to the escalating need for expert guidance, MikeWorldWide (MWW), the top independent public relations firm in the country, has appointed the former head of Chicago Corporate Affairs at FleischmanHillard. This strategic move is part of a series of investments aimed at enhancing senior talent to address the increasing demand for critical counsel. This addition underscores MWW's commitment to staying ahead in the public relations industry. The announcement was made on April 21, 2026, in New York.

data.title: Trellist, Inc. and Twentify Announce Exclusive U.S. Partnership to Deliver AI-Powered Qualitative Research Platform 'Quals.ai'
data.description: In West Chester, Pennsylvania on April 21, 2026, Trellist, Inc. and Twentify have announced an exclusive partnership to distribute Quals.ai, a platform utilized by numerous companies and brands worldwide. This collaboration brings together Trellist® Marketing and Technology with Twentify, owner of Quals.ai, to broaden the reach of the platform. With hundreds of companies already using Quals.ai, this partnership aims to expand its distribution significantly.

data.title: NEW YORK CITY'S ICONIC JIM HENSON'S CREATURE SHOP OFFERS ADDITIONAL DATES FOR ITS BEHIND-THE-SCENES TOURS FOR JUNE THROUGH SEPTEMBER
data.description: A larger number of tickets are currently available for one-of-a-kind tours that are becoming a top attraction for both locals and visitors alike. These tours showcase puppetry and demonstrations on puppet-building, along with the chance to purchase exclusive merchandise and view rare items from the archive, all in honor of Jim Henson's approaching 90th birthday! The tours take place in Queens, New York.

data.title: Association for Consumer Debt Relief Welcomes Erick Matos as Government Relations Manager for the West
data.description: In Washington, the Association for Consumer Debt Relief (ACDR) revealed the appointment of Erick Matos as the Government Relations Manager for the West. Matos will play a pivotal role in advancing ACDR's advocacy initiatives in several western states. Matos expressed enthusiasm for the chance to impact individuals positively, stating that state policymakers are crucial in shaping financial assistance programs, reflecting ACDR's commitment to making a meaningful impact.

data.title: LEMAY - AMERICA'S CAR MUSEUM ANNOUNCES NEW CAFÉ PARTNERSHIP WITH EL KOREANO
data.description: Opening to the public on Thursday, April 23, is El Koreano, the new café located at LeMay – America's Car Museum, offering a diverse range of dining options for visitors. The café features bold fusion flavors and vibrant street-food inspired dishes, along with an all-day dining menu, espresso bar, and selections of beer and wine. This launch introduces a partnership that enhances the culinary experience of museum-goers and provides a refreshing addition to the venue.

data.title: New York AG pursues billions in damages from Coinbase and Gemini for illegal prediction markets, labeling them as gambling.
data.description: New York Attorney General Letitia James has accused Gemini and Coinbase of running prediction markets that she claims are illegal gambling operations.

data.title: Versigent Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call and Participation in May Investor Conferences
data.description: Versigent PLC, a leading company in low- and high-voltage electrical architectures, is set to reveal its Q1 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, after market close. A conference call with CEO Joe Liotine and CFO will follow at 4:15 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. The company's stock trades on NYSE under the symbol VGNT.

data.title: PlusAI and Churchill Capital Corp IX Terminate Business Combination
data.description: PlusAI and Churchill Capital Corp IX have decided to terminate their business combination due to market conditions. Despite this, PlusAI maintains strong commercial momentum and is well-positioned for long-term growth. The decision is supported by existing PlusAI investors who have confidence in the company's business strength and technology leadership. PlusAI, listed on Nasdaq as CCIX, remains focused on its growth and commercialization plans.
